name: context-forge
description: Set up and maintain the Context Forge methodology in any project (any stack) — initialize context files, refine prompts, plan and add features, run the build/verify/debug/PR loop, log architecture decisions and lessons, audit for drift, compact for token budget, and resume work via tiered context loading (compact digest first, full files per task). Includes persistent memory (per-project lessons + cross-project preferences) and lightweight, token-free command hooks that auto-load the digest, record activity, flag budget overruns, and guard generated/protected files.
